Foundation:
FIRST read ARCH.md and docs/ENGINE-SPEC.md at the worktree root ‚Äî they are the source of truth (repo layout: SPEC ¬ß3; menu schema: SPEC ¬ß4). Build the monorepo foundation:
1. Python env: `python3 -m venv .venv`, requirements.txt with fastapi, uvicorn[standard], pydantic>=2, pytest, httpx, jsonschema, qrcode[pil], pillow, reportlab, google-genai, beautifulsoup4, requests. `./.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt` and verify imports.
2. shared/menu_schema.json ‚Äî JSON Schema for the chu·∫©n menu format (SPEC ¬ß4, this is the core data model every later phase reads; be thorough: shop info incl payment cod/vietqr + direct_discount_pct + theme.seed_colors, menu.sections + menu.dishes with price/platform_price/direct_only/hidden/sold_out/almost_out, source block). Plus shared/order_states.py listing order states (SPEC ¬ß8).
3. data/fixtures/demo_shop.json ‚Äî realistic Vietnamese c∆°m vƒÉn ph√≤ng shop (C∆°m T·∫•m C√¥ Ba: ~3 sections, 10 dishes with VND prices, platform_price ~15% higher) validating against the schema.
4. infra/storage.py ‚Äî storage adapter: interface get/put/list/delete per collection; LocalJSONStorage writing under data/ (dirs per collection); designed so a Firestore impl can swap in later.
5. infra/publish.py ‚Äî per-shop slug registry (slugify VN names, uniqueness, reserved words).
6. agents/tiemquen_agent/server.py ‚Äî FastAPI app factory with /health, minimal shops CRUD (create from fixture, get by slug), CORS, static mounts for buyer/ seller/ data/media/. Entry: `./.venv/bin/uvicorn agents.tiemquen_agent.server:app`. Add __init__.py files so packages import cleanly from repo root.
7. scripts/e2e_smoke.py ‚Äî end-to-end smoke script that MUST run with no GEMINI_API_KEY (mock mode) and exit 0. In this phase it: validates fixture against schema, creates shop via storage, resolves slug, boots the app with httpx ASGI client and asserts /health + get-shop. LATER PHASES EXTEND THIS SCRIPT ‚Äî structure it as numbered steps with clear section comments.
8. tests/ ‚Äî pytest for schema validation (good + bad fixture), storage adapter, slug registry, health endpoint. All green via `./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q`.
9. README.md ‚Äî quickstart (venv, install, run server, run tests, run smoke).
Note .gitignore already excludes .venv and data/media. Commit everything (including data/fixtures) with a clear message.
Engine:
FIRST read docs/ENGINE-SPEC.md ¬ß1 ¬ß2 ¬ß6-theme ¬ß7 and ARCH.md ¬ß5. Build the compose engine (LLM compose-time only):
1. agents/tiemquen_agent/a2ui.py ‚Äî A2UI v0.9 protocol per SPEC ¬ß1: builders make_create_surface/make_update_components/make_update_data_model/make_delete_surface; parse + validate + REPAIR: inject missing version, infer missing action key from payload shape (components‚ÜíupdateComponents, catalogId‚ÜícreateSurface, path+value‚ÜíupdateDataModel), ensure_create_surface auto-prepend, flat-wire component checks (id/component present, root exists, childIds shapes: childId | childIds.explicitList | childIds.dataBinding, leaf values path|literalString|literalNumber|literalBoolean, event shape). Validator returns (clean_messages, warnings).
2. agents/tiemquen_agent/catalogs/tiemquen_emenu_v1.json ‚Äî component catalog per SPEC ¬ß2: Page, MenuSection, HeroHeader, Badge, DishCard, ComboCard, ReorderCard, CartBar, GroupOrderButton, ReviewStrip, CheckoutForm, PaymentPicker, OrderStatus ‚Äî each entry JSON-Schema (type/properties with descriptions/required). This doubles as composer prompt documentation.
3. compose/theme.py ‚Äî derive full palette (bg, surface, text tiers, accent, success/warn) from 4 seed hex colors + WCAG contrast check ‚â•4.5 for text pairs; deterministic.
4. compose/composer.py ‚Äî compose(menu_chu·∫©n, theme, variant) ‚Üí validated A2UI message list. MOCK MODE (no GEMINI_API_KEY env): deterministic template composer building the full surface from the menu (HeroHeader, sections with DishCards bound to /prices and /soldout DataModel paths, CartBar, CheckoutForm COD, GroupOrderButton) ‚Äî no network. REAL MODE: google-genai (model gemini-flash-latest) with catalog JSON in prompt, response wrapped in <a2ui-json> tags, parse ‚Üí validate/repair ‚Üí one retry with correction prompt on failure. Compose VARIANTS per ARCH ¬ß5.3: office vs table batch, lunch vs regular ‚Äî cached separately.
5. compose/racing.py ‚Äî race_compose(n): asyncio N identical compose calls, first valid wins, cancel losers; only used in real mode; RACE_ENABLED/RACE_COUNT env.
6. compose/cache.py ‚Äî write composed variants to data/composed/<slug>/<variant>.json; sold-out/price changes are updateDataModel PATCHES appended (no structural recompose) ‚Äî implement patch_data(slug, path, value).
7. Server endpoints: POST /shops/{slug}/compose (recompose all variants), POST /shops/{slug}/patch (soldout/price patch). 
8. Tests: validator repair cases (missing version, missing action key each shape, missing createSurface, bad component refs), theme contrast, mock compose produces valid messages + all catalog components used are in catalog, patch flow. Extend scripts/e2e_smoke.py: fixture menu ‚Üí mock compose (all 4 variants) ‚Üí validate ‚Üí cache files exist ‚Üí patch sold_out ‚Üí cached JSON contains the patch. All pytest green. Commit.
ImportAgent:
FIRST read docs/ENGINE-SPEC.md ¬ß5 and ARCH.md ¬ß3.1. Build the import pipeline (OCR = ƒë∆∞·ªùng ch√≠nh):
1. agents/tiemquen_agent/toolable.py ‚Äî function-calling harness: given typed Python tool functions (docstring = model-facing spec), run a google-genai tool-calling loop, harvest calls, return {"tool_calls": [...], "message": str}. Strip additionalProperties from generated schemas. MOCK MODE: accepts a pre-recorded tool-call list and replays it through the same assembly path (so mock and real share 100% of the assembly code).
2. agents/tiemquen_agent/tools/menu_tools.py ‚Äî set_shop_info(name, phone?, address?, hours?), add_section(id, title), add_dish(section_id, name, price, desc?, image_ref?), finish(confidence, warnings) ‚Äî assembling into the chu·∫©n menu format (shared/menu_schema.json), validating price sanity (VND, 5k‚Äì500k warn).
3. agents/tiemquen_agent/agents/import_agent.py ‚Äî entry import_menu(source): source = screenshot path(s) | URL | raw text. Screenshot ‚Üí REAL: google-genai multimodal (image parts + OCR prompt forcing menu_tools calls); MOCK (no GEMINI_API_KEY): load data/fixtures/grab_screenshot_toolcalls.json (create it: realistic simulated OCR tool-calls for the demo shop) and replay. URL ‚Üí html_parse.py best-effort ShopeeFood parse (requests+bs4, graceful fail ‚Üí raise ImportFallbackToOCR). Output envelope: {menu, warnings, confidence} per SPEC ¬ß5.
4. Image rehost stub: infra/media.py ‚Äî copy/download dish images into data/media/<shop>/, rewrite image_url to /media/... paths.
5. Server endpoints: POST /import (json body: url or fixture ref; multipart screenshot), GET /shops/{slug}/menu, PATCH /shops/{slug}/menu (review edits: price change, hide dish, add direct_only dish, section retitle) ‚Äî PATCH triggers recompose via compose pipeline.
6. Tests: toolable mock replay ‚Üí valid chu·∫©n menu; price sanity warnings; html_parse graceful failure; PATCH ‚Üí recompose called (monkeypatch). Extend scripts/e2e_smoke.py: mock import fixture ‚Üí chu·∫©n menu validates ‚Üí PATCH price -10% ‚Üí recompose ‚Üí composed cache updated. All pytest green. Commit.
BuyerOrders:
FIRST read docs/ENGINE-SPEC.md ¬ß1 ¬ß8 ¬ß9 and ARCH.md ¬ß3.2 ¬ß3.3 ¬ß5.3. Build buyer page + orders + notify (ZERO LLM on this path ‚Äî golden rule):
1. buyer/index.html + buyer/renderer.js (~200-300 lines vanilla JS, no framework, no build step): fetch cached A2UI JSON for slug+variant, walk the flat component list (root id="root", childId/childIds.explicitList/childIds.dataBinding), resolve {path}/{literal*} values against the DataModel, render semantic HTML for every catalog component (DishCard with price VND format + soldOut hiding, CartBar sticky, CheckoutForm, etc.), dispatch component events (add_to_cart etc.) to order.js. Apply theme palette via CSS variables. Total buyer payload target <150KB.
2. buyer/context_rules.js ‚Äî SPEC ¬ß9: read ?b= batch tag (office‚Üípromote GroupOrderButton + pick office variant), local hour 10‚Äì13 ‚Üí lunch variant/section first, localStorage last_order ‚Üí prepend ReorderCard, fetch soldout patch JSON and apply as DataModel patch. Pure rules, no LLM.
3. buyer/order.js ‚Äî cart state, checkout COD (name, phone, address/to√Ý nh√Ý, note), POST /orders, then poll GET /orders/{id}/status showing 'qu√°n ƒë√£ th·∫•y ƒë∆°n' when seller_seen; re-order storage in localStorage.
4. infra/orders.py ‚Äî state machine per SPEC ¬ß8: created‚Üíseller_seen‚Üíconfirmed‚Üídelivering‚Üídone | cancelled | no_show_flagged; explicit allowed-transition table, invalid transition raises; persisted via storage adapter; every order stores batch_id for flyer analytics.
5. infra/notify.py ‚Äî pipeline: on created ‚Üí push via channel chain [FCMWebPushStub, ConsoleChannel]; ack timer (asyncio, ACK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS env default 120, tests use 0.1) ‚Üí if not seller_seen fire SMSStubChannel (logs 'SMS to <phone>: <order summary>'). All adapters share one Channel interface so real FCM/SMS drop in later.
6. Group orders (ARCH ¬ß3.3): POST /group-orders (from shop+batch) ‚Üí share URL /g/{gid}; buyer/group.html: members add name + items into one order; closer closes ‚Üí single order created + per-member split amounts + per-member VietQR placeholder (interface only, vietqr real in next phase); GET /group-orders/{gid} state.
7. agents/tiemquen_agent/agents/order_parse_agent.py ‚Äî parse pasted Zalo chat text ‚Üí order draft: MOCK mode = deterministic heuristic parser (dish-name fuzzy match against menu + quantities + address line); REAL mode = toolable with add_item/set_customer tools. Endpoint POST /orders/parse-text.
8. Server: serve buyer at GET /t/{slug} (inject slug+variant list), mount /g/{gid}; seller ack endpoint POST /orders/{id}/ack + transitions endpoint.
9. Tests: state machine table (all legal + illegal transitions), notify fallback timing (fast timeout), group order split math (uneven totals), order-parse heuristic on 3 sample chat texts, buyer page endpoint returns HTML containing renderer.js. Extend scripts/e2e_smoke.py: place COD order ‚Üí notify console fired ‚Üí ack ‚Üí seller_seen visible in status ‚Üí confirm ‚Üí done; group order 3 members ‚Üí split correct. All pytest green. Commit.
FlyerSeller:
FIRST read docs/ENGINE-SPEC.md ¬ß6 and ARCH.md ¬ß2 ¬ß3.1 ¬ß4.4. Build flyer generation + seller PWA:
1. agents/tiemquen_agent/imagen.py ‚Äî gen hero/flyer background: REAL mode google-genai generate_content response_modalities=[TEXT,IMAGE], aspect ratio per format (A5/A4 portrait, sticker square), sanitize pre-pass via cheap model, hard constraints REPEATED at end of prompt, ask for palette JSON (4 seed hex) alongside image, one retry if text-only; MOCK mode: Pillow-generated placeholder (solid seed-color bg + shop name text) so the whole flyer path works offline. Cache PNGs to data/media/<shop>/ with TTL cleanup helper.
2. infra/qr_batch.py ‚Äî batch registry: create_batch(shop, format, location_tag) ‚Üí batch_id; QR URL = /t/{slug}?b={batch_id}; orders already store batch_id ‚Äî add analytics query orders_per_batch(shop, since).
3. infra/vietqr.py ‚Äî EMVCo TLV VietQR payload (NAPAS: bank BIN, account, amount, message) with correct CRC16-CCITT; unit-test against a known-good reference vector; render QR PNG via qrcode lib; helper deep_link + copy-text ('copy s·ªë TK + s·ªë ti·ªÅn').
4. infra/pdf_export.py ‚Äî flyer PDF per format: A5 (order-bag insert), A4 (pantry poster), sticker (square): hero image full-bleed, shop name + tagline, 3 best-seller dishes with prices, big CTA 'TH√àM? QU√âT.', batch QR bottom-right in the safe zone, print-ready (reportlab, mm sizes, 300dpi images). export_flyers(shop, batch_ids) ‚Üí data/media/<shop>/flyer_<format>.pdf.
5. seller/ web PWA (vanilla JS, no build): index.html + app.js with 3 tabs ‚Äî (a) Onboard wizard: paste URL / pick fixture screenshot ‚Üí review table (editable prices, hide toggles, add direct-only dish) ‚Üí 3 interview questions (ship zone, payment, direct discount %) ‚Üí publish (calls import + PATCH + compose); (b) ƒê∆°n: live order list (poll), ACK button ('ƒê√£ th·∫•y ƒë∆°n'), status advance buttons, ƒë∆°n-theo-batch counts; (c) T·ªù r∆°i: pick format ‚Üí generate ‚Üí download PDF links. manifest.json + minimal sw.js (cache shell) so it installs as PWA.
6. Server: endpoints for batches CRUD, flyer generate/download, batch analytics; mount seller/ at /seller.
7. Tests: vietqr CRC reference vector + payload field order, batch analytics counting, pdf files created with >10KB size, imagen mock produces PNG. Extend scripts/e2e_smoke.py: create A5+A4 batches ‚Üí mock imagen ‚Üí export flyers ‚Üí PDFs exist ‚Üí vietqr payload for group-split member validates CRC. All pytest green. Commit.
Verify:
Full verification sweep of the Ti·ªám Quen MVP in this worktree. DO NOT assume ‚Äî run everything:
1. Fresh-install check: delete and recreate .venv, `./.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt`.
2. `./.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q` ‚Äî fix any failure.
3. `env -u GEMINI_API_KEY ./.venv/bin/python scripts/e2e_smoke.py` ‚Äî must exit 0 covering: fixture import ‚Üí chu·∫©n menu ‚Üí compose 4 variants ‚Üí patch ‚Üí COD order lifecycle ‚Üí notify fallback ‚Üí group order split ‚Üí batches ‚Üí flyers PDFs ‚Üí vietqr CRC.
4. Boot the real server (`./.venv/bin/uvicorn agents.tiemquen_agent.server:app --port 8787 &`), then curl: /health, seed demo shop, /t/<slug> returns HTML referencing renderer.js, POST /orders round-trip, seller page /seller loads, flyer download works. Kill server after.
5. Golden-rule audit: grep the buyer/ dir and the order-serving endpoints for any google-genai/LLM usage ‚Äî must be none; record findings.
6. Measure buyer payload (index.html + renderer.js + context_rules.js + order.js + composed JSON for demo shop) ‚Äî record total KB vs <150KB target.
7. Update README.md so quickstart matches reality verbatim (venv, install, uvicorn command, demo shop seed, buyer URL, seller URL, smoke + tests commands).
8. Write VERIFY.md: what was run, results, payload size, known gaps / deferred items (real Gemini calls untested without key, FCM/SMS are stubs, etc.).
Fix everything broken; leave the tree green. Commit.
